tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: Web3 can be used for positive things. @cz_binance explains how blockchain makes global micro-donations possible, allowing people anywhere to support missions they believe in. @PrisonProf_BNB support helped raise $500K+ to bring free Prison Professors courses into prisons. Full conversation tomorrow.
tweets.translated: @cz_binance 的转发：Web3 可以用于积极的事情。 @cz_binance 解释了区块链如何使全球小额捐赠成为可能，让任何地方的人们都可以支持他们相信的使命。@PrisonProf_BNB 的支持帮助筹集了超过 50 万美元，为监狱提供免费的监狱教授课程。明天全面对话。

tweets.content: Happy Father’s Day! Save some crypto for your kids. They will thank you one day.

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Wow, $SPCX is now down over $583B in MC... Since Jim Cramer gave a bullish call at $210. Pretty amazing to witness tbh. Inverse Cramer would have returned ~21% in 3 trading days, outperforming a year in your largest indexes?
tweets.translated: 哇，$SPCX 现在在 MC 中下跌超过 $583B...自从 Jim Cramer 在 $210 发出看涨电话后。亲眼目睹真是太神奇了。 Inverse Cramer 会在 3 个交易日内实现约 21% 的回报，超过您最大指数的一年表现？

tweets.content: That’s for you to decide. But just throwing this out there: If $AAOI hits projections, that’s over 800%+ Y/Y growth, and $5.6B revenue annualized off $12.8B MC. My guess is that the $471m/month will keep going up as demand seems to scale exponentially into 2028. I’d expect ASP/margins to go up across the board as well. Especially as the industry is bottlenecked and $AMD + CSPs are going around hunting for LTAs.
tweets.translated: 这由你决定。但简单地说：如果 $AAOI 达到预测，则同比增长超过 800%+，年化收入为 $5.6B，而 MC 为 $12.8B。我的猜测是，随着需求似乎在 2028 年呈指数级增长，每月 4.71 亿美元将继续上升。我预计平均售价/利润率也会全面上升。特别是当行业遇到瓶颈并且 $AMD + CSP 正在四处寻找长期协议时。

tweets.content: As for $LPK: Maybe $3B-$5B seems reasonable when they fully volume ramp if I had to guess. Feels more asymmetrical to me personally since it's just a waiting game and they have the customers for glass substrates. Small machine supplier chokepoints usually cap out from TAM though and don't go to $20B+ unless you're ASML or hold many chokepoints like KLAC. Not many dominant "monopolies" like these out there right before volume ramp this small: Maybe you have stuff like: - Aixtron (MOCVD) ~$8B - Towa (compression bonding) ~$2B - Techwing (memory handler/cube probes) ~$1.5B - MSScorps (CPO inspection), but pre-ramp. $850M - Riber (quantum MBE), very pre-ramp ~$350M Then LPK Laser for glass core substrates (about to ramp) at ~$730M, which thematically should have more premiums than memory. (eg. major advanced packaging shift, CPO adjacent, etc). Lot of obscure chemical monopolies I know of, but those don't get as much attention cause BOM is much lower than equipment. But for lpk you have: eg. “80% of customers among major global players have selected LPKF equipment”. 70% of LIDE market share target for TGV in the glass-core ramp, should be very material. (disclosure: own, the listed names above aside from techwing/aixtron, NFI). Just kinda the path they go if you follow $AEHR at ~$3.5B now: - <$500m: "Oh they have no customers!" ---> (probably somewhere in the middle here). - < $1.5B: "Maybe volume comes soon!" - $3B+ onward: "Looks like they're starting to volume ramp. Just a lesson for the cycle of the chokepoint machine suppliers from my personal experiences.
tweets.translated: 至于 $LPK：如果我不得不猜测的话，当它们完全成交量上升时，也许 $3B-$5B 似乎是合理的。我个人感觉更不对称，因为这只是一场等待游戏，而且他们有玻璃基板的客户。小型机器供应商的瓶颈通常会受到 TAM 的限制，并且不会达到 $20B+，除非您是 ASML 或拥有许多像 KLAC 这样的瓶颈。在产量如此之小之前，没有多少像这样的主导“垄断”：也许你有这样的东西： - Aixtron (MOCVD) ~$8B - Towa (压缩粘合) ~$2B - Techwing (内存处理器/立方体探针) ~$1.5B - MSScorps (CPO 检查)，但预斜坡。 8.5 亿美元 - Riber（量子 MBE），非常预爬升 ~ 3.5 亿美元，然后用于玻璃芯基板的 LPK 激光（即将爬升）约为 7.3 亿美元，从主题上讲，其溢价应该比内存更高。 （例如，主要先进封装转移、CPO 相邻等）。我知道有很多不起眼的化学垄断企业，但这些企业并没有受到太多关注，因为 BOM 远低于设备。但对于 lpk 你有：例如。 “全球主要企业中80%的客户都选择了LPKF设备”。 LIDE 玻璃芯坡道 TGV 市场份额 70% 的目标应该是非常重要的。 （披露：拥有，上面列出的名称除了 techwing/aixtron、NFI）。如果你现在以 ~$3.5B 的价格关注 $AEHR，他们就会走这样的路： - <$500m：“哦，他们没有客户！” ---> （可能在中间的某个地方）。 - < $1.5B：“也许销量很快就会到来！” - $3B+ 起：“看起来他们开始增加销量。这只是我个人经历中对阻塞点机器供应商周期的一个教训。
